    1. topic

Annotation Type SigNozLog

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(SOURCE) @Documented public @interface SigNozLog
Injects a private static final SLF4J Logger field named log into the annotated class at compile time, equivalent to Lombok's @Slf4j.

The generated field: 

  private static final org.slf4j.Logger log =
      org.slf4j.LoggerFactory.getLogger(AnnotatedClass.class);

All log statements written through this field automatically benefit from:

  • Trace/span ID injection via MDC
  • Sensitive field masking configured in signoz.logging.masked-fields
  • OTLP/JSON output routing configured in signoz.logging.mode

Usage: 

  @SigNozLog
  @Service
  public class OrderService {
      public void create(Order order) {
          log.info("Creating order {}", order.getId()); // log injected
      }
  }

Requires signoz-annotation-processor on the compile classpath (included transitively by the starter).

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String
    topic
    Custom topic/name for the logger.

  • Element Details

    • topic

      String topic
      Custom topic/name for the logger. Defaults to the annotated class name. When set, the generated field will use LoggerFactory.getLogger(topic()).
      Default:
      ""
